tool.title: string (rappture2web)
tool.about:
Example of a Rappture <string> object.
Strings are bits of text--single line or multiple lines. When you click Simulate, the input strings are echoed to the output.

about.label: Title
about.description: This text will be used as the title for all plots.

about.label: Input
about.description: This is the control file for the program.

string.default: Enter your SPICE commands in this area.
